name: baml
description: Teaches Claude Code to write idiomatic BAML (the baml_language rewrite). Two describe-first skills sharing the same content: `core` discovers each name as needed; `overview` leads with `baml describe baml` to dump the whole stdlib first. BAML is a statically-typed, expression-oriented language (basically TypeScript with snake_case methods and `name: type,` fields) with first-class LLM functions. The CLI is the reference — the skills name the few fatal traps and otherwise defer to `baml describe` for every stdlib name, type, and signature rather than guessing. The arena-winning micro-describe variant.
